svg.title: Conplaya — component architecture
svg.desc: Portrait poster: how the major components in Conplaya (a console audio player) connect — CLI bootstrap, application orchestrator, playback engine, visualization pipeline, album-art renderer, and console output.
svg.text: .NET 9 console audio player · single-file Windows EXE · Unicode + 24-bit ANSI rendering

g.text: Console: 24-bit ANSI · Unicode bars / braille · half-block album art · status line · cursor hidden
solid arrow = control / data flow within app
dashed arrow = call into third-party NuGet library
